Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jan-23-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Jennifer L. Sommer, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Joseph Schoepp and Julianne Schoepp

NO OTHER APPEARANCE STATED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Joseph Schoepp's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories is granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified supplemental responses within 21 days of notice of this order. A response must be full and complete at the time it is made. If there is a need to amend, it must be made in compliance with CCP Section 2030.310. The Court finds that plaintiff asserted unmeritorious objections. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $390 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
